moments.author: Dan Loeb
moments.why: A high-profile hedge fund manager tweeting this electrified crypto markets as Bitcoin held above $60K.

moments.author: Vlad Tenev
moments.quote: Every capability a human can do will be available to an AI agent
moments.why: Robinhood’s CEO signaled that AI agents may soon match human traders, pushing the debate on AI in retail finance.

moments.author: LeBron James
moments.quote: LFG!!!!!! THE 🤫 HAS 🛬 at the World Cup! Helluva goal there Young 🤴🏾! 🫡. GO 🇺🇸
moments.why: LeBron’s endorsement of Balogun’s viral 'Silencer' celebration at the U.S. World Cup stunned fans across sports and culture.
